title: TaCZ: Refabricated
description: An unofficial Fabric port of Timeless and Classics Zero. The most Immersive and Customizable modern FPS experience in Minecraft
body:
## Timeless and Classics Zero: Refabricated

This mod is an unofficial Fabric port of [TaCZ](https://modrinth.com/mod/timeless-and-classics-zero). TaCZ was developed by reorganizing the original TaC development team devs, completely rewriting all the code, remaking the models and animations, and adding and modifying many features.

**Note:**
- **This mod requires [Forge Config API Port](https://modrinth.com/mod/forge-config-api-port).**
- **This mod is still experimental, perhaps there exist some bugs.**
- **<font color="red">If you want to load custom gunpacks in MC1.21.1, you can upgrade gunpacks to be 1.21.1 NeoForge compatible using the [pack upgrader mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tacz-pack-upgrader), and then try load them with TACZ-Refabricated-1.21.1.</font>**
- **As for 1.21, you can install [Keybind Fix Plus](https://modrinth.com/mod/keybind-fix-plus) or similar mods to solve keybinding conflicts.**
- **<font color="red">If minecraft texts get changed to little squares after putting custom gunpacks, you can try to unzip the gunpack and then load the unzipped.</font>**

You can get the detail from original project.
